title: crotalaria torrei
intro: Crotalaria torrei, also known as the Devil's Horsewhip or Torre's Rattlebox, is a plant species native to Africa, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria torrei include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and seeds of the plant are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
